subcodes.first_line: O leaf enraptured! Thy lengthy letters have been received, and their contents have brought joy to this sorrowful heart, for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه منجذبه نامه های مفصل واصل و مضامین سبب سرور قلب حزین شد زیرا تفصیل
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
